pi_items.source: GCompris-qt GitHub repository (https://github.com/gcompris/GCompris-qt) shows align4 directory in /src/activities/; Official GCompris screenshots page confirms activity name as 'Align four (against Tux)' with internal name 'align4'

GCompris-qt ActivityInfo documentation indicates available sections/categories include: computer, discovery, experiment, fun, math, puzzle, reading, strategy. Official GCompris screenshots page (https://www.gcompris.net/screenshots-en.html) explicitly categorizes 'Align four (against Tux)' under 'strategy' category.

Task setup_task.sh (line 15) shows removal of this path, and export_result.sh (lines 11, 67) uses this path as USER_SCREENSHOT variable. This is the configured path for task evidence, not an external claim requiring independent verification.

privileged_info_summary: GCompris is a free, open-source educational software suite with 190+ activities. The 'align4' (Connect 4) activity is confirmed to exist in GCompris-qt and is correctly categorized under the 'strategy' section for educational gameplay against computer AI (Tux) or against another player. The task correctly identifies both the activity name and category as they exist in the official GCompris software.
